_note: STRUCTURAL DEMONSTRATION ONLY. AUGMANITAI is a terminology DATASET, not an AI system. This CycloneDX BOM documents the dataset for supply-chain transparency; it does not assert any ISO certification, EU AI Act conformity, or ML performance metrics. Descriptive linguistic research, not normative (§1). Longitudinal n=1 terminological priority deposit (non-peer-reviewed per §11). ISO-inspired, not ISO-certified (§16). Restricted applications per §20. See DISCLAIMER.md in the repository root.

component.name: AUGMANITAI 1000-Term Compendium
component.description: Structured terminology dataset for phenomena at the human-AI interface. Descriptive linguistic research, not normative (§1). Longitudinal n=1 terminological priority deposit (non-peer-reviewed per §11). Informed by ISO 704 / ISO 1087 / ISO 30042 — ISO-inspired, not ISO-certified (§16).

components.name: AUGMANITAI 1000-Term Compendium
components.description: 1000 terms across 16 domains. Descriptive linguistic research.

components.name: AUGMANITAI Ontology (OWL / RDF Turtle)
components.description: Formal OWL ontology. W3C SKOS, OntoLex-Lemon, SHACL. No ML model.

components.name: AUGMANITAI TBX Export
components.description: TermBase eXchange serialization (informed by ISO 30042; no ISO certification asserted).

doesNotClaim.performanceMetrics: None asserted; AUGMANITAI is a dataset, not a model.
doesNotClaim.regulatoryEndorsement: None. No affiliation with any regulatory body.
